🌻
For you, always — 🌻
Can't even seem to describe how important and precious you are to me. However hard I try. Every comparison feels too small, Cause you've become something essential— Kind of like the sun. It's only when I imagine a day without you, Nothing feels quite right. Somehow, somewhere along the way, Thoughts of you became part of every day. And that's the of the poem
my favourite smile 🌻
with love, always ♡
